description_long: This rifle features a modern, angular design with a predominantly black and orange color scheme, giving it a striking and tactical appearance. The body is composed of a robust main receiver with a sleek, matte black upper and orange lower components, including a distinctive stock and fore-end. The rifle is equipped with a fixed stock and a prominent pistol grip, providing ergonomic support for the user. A compact optical sight is mounted on the top rail, enhancing aiming precision, while the barrel is short and squared-off, ending flush with the fore-end. The magazine appears to be integrated or internal, with no visible detachable box or drum. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, angular rifle with a black and orange color scheme, fixed stock, compact sight, and short barrel. Its robust build and ergonomic features make it suitable for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, and mounted sight.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the squared-off barrel and the alignment of the sight above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the stock and fore-end.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the rear of the sight, showing the rifle's symmetry and compactness.
